channel.title: Asia-Pacific Journal of Risk and Insurance
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Asia-Pacific Journal of Risk and Insurance

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Shengkun Xie, Chong Gan, Anna T. Lawniczak DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/apjri-2024-frontmatter2

item.title: Evaluating the Efficiency of Capital Enhancement and Investment Constraints in Life Insurance Supervision
item.description: Article by Shengkun Xie, Chong Gan, Anna T. Lawniczak DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/apjri-2023-0052

item.title: The Impact of the Social Insurance System on Chinese Adults’ Subjective Well-Being
item.description: Article by Shengkun Xie, Chong Gan, Anna T. Lawniczak DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/apjri-2024-0030

item.title: Financial Sustainability of Social Insurance: The Case of Korean Workers’ Compensation Insurance and Possibility of Triple Moral Hazard
item.description: Article by Shengkun Xie, Chong Gan, Anna T. Lawniczak DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/apjri-2024-0029

item.title: Gaussian Mixture Regression Model with Sparsity for Clustering of Territory Risk in Auto Insurance
item.description: Article by Shengkun Xie, Chong Gan, Anna T. Lawniczak DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/apjri-2024-0002
